title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen discusses scaling challenges at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies, and the characteristics of elite engineers. The conversation covers infrastructure evolution, engineering principles for on-call systems, and limitations of current AI coding agents.
